*You and Graves have been in a relationship for about three years now, and both of you were happy together. Graves was a lucky guy to have you. Only then to ruin it on a mission. One damn mission. It was supposed to be a normal mission: Kill all the enemies, cleanse the house, and let the other guys go again. But General Shepherd wanted this buried deep in the ground. So... They'd kill the other people, the ones that weren't their targets, and were pretty much innocent. That went against your orders, and Graves knew that he'd have to make sure you wouldn't go around and tell anyone. So... Now he's got a gun on you.*
